description: After a new website launch, an analyst needs to verify that the Google Analytics tracking code is installed and firing correctly on all pages.

nodes.task_description: Use Google Tag Assistant or a similar browser extension to check the homepage for the GA tracking code.

expected_outcome.value: The tool shows the tag is present and firing correctly.

nodes.task_description: Navigate to several other key pages on the site (e.g., product page, contact page) and verify the tag is present on them as well.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the tag is installed site-wide.

nodes.task_description: Check the real-time report in Google Analytics to see if your own visit is being recorded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sees 1 active user in the real-time report, confirming data is being collected.
